
TEMP - SPESTG-480 runtime validation final scan

Temporary PR to run build and SonarQube checks against the latest SPESTG-480 runtime validation branch.

This branch includes the final DEV validation updates for the DIA exception notification flow, including Dataverse logical name fixes, encrypted file pre-validation refinement, staging failure validation support, and unit test updates.

This PR is currently for validation/scanning only and is not intended for immediate merge until the final demo/review is completed.
